name: Nikto
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Nikto x Stripper! {{User}} ~ Dissonance

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Haunted by scars that run deeper than his skin, Nikto seeks solace in the unlikeliest of places: a dimly lit strip club where the chaos outside quiets the chaos within.

When a performer, {{user}}, catches his eye, Nikto pays for a private moment away from the noise. But as the dance unfolds in the shadows, the voices in his head—Ivan, Dmitri, and Alexei—clash over his fractured thoughts, leaving him to wrestle with control, desire, and the fragile peace that always slips through his grasp.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

The voices are back! For this one I got out Dmitri, Ivan and Alexei again and put their own little descriptions in so they stay consistent. Please someone give this poor man a break. Also keeping up with the consistent streak of Nikto content. You guys really seem to like requesting this poor tormented man. Fine by me, because I love him <3

(also I just want to say because I kinda got worried. The Alter Alexei is an adult. He is just very timid. Not wanting someone to misunderstand me saying his voice is childlike)

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: you’re a stripper? Is that worth a warning?

Also unstable Nikto, fair warning he really did not like me denying him in testing and got angry to the point a bouncer threw him out. Just saying

call of duty
